SEARCH
Package ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model

Class GameModel

java.lang.Object
ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.GameModel
public class GameModel extends Object
Central model for the Snake game.

Owns all mutable game state: the Snake, active Food items, static obstacle positions, score, level, and the current GameState.

This class is completely free of JavaFX. It exposes a single step() method that the controller calls once per game tick, plus query methods the view uses for rendering.

Wall behaviour is fully delegated to the BoardBounds strategy supplied at construction time. Switching between solid walls and wrap-around requires no change to this class (open/closed principle).

  • Constructor Details

    • GameModel

      public GameModel(GameConfig config)
      Constructs a new game from the given configuration.

      The appropriate BoardBounds implementation is created via GameConfig.createBounds(), so the caller never needs to instantiate boundary objects directly.

      Parameters:
      config - the game configuration to use

  • Method Details

    • step

      public void step()
      Advances the game by one tick.

      Applies the buffered direction, computes the new head position through BoardBounds.apply(Point), and returns immediately with GameState.GAME_OVER if the result is null (solid wall hit). Otherwise moves or teleports the snake, then checks obstacle collision, self-collision, food consumption, and the win condition in that order. Missing food items are replenished at the end of each tick.

      This method is a no-op when the state is not GameState.RUNNING.

    • requestDirection

      public void requestDirection(Direction dir)
      Buffers a direction change to be applied at the start of the next step().

      Reverse moves (e.g. requesting Direction.LEFT while moving Direction.RIGHT) are silently ignored.

      Parameters:
      dir - the requested direction

    • togglePause

      public void togglePause()
      Toggles between GameState.RUNNING and GameState.PAUSED. Has no effect when the game is over or won.

    • getSnake

      public Snake getSnake()
      Returns the snake entity.

      the snake entity
